seasons.name: Season 14 - Permanent Bans
seasons._comment: Cooler Jake is banned for the entire season

seasons.name: Season 14 - Week 1 (Mar 15-21)
seasons._comment: Week 1: Ban Husker Knight and Embarrassing Bard

seasons.name: Season 14 - Week 2 (Mar 22-28)
seasons._comment: Week 2: Ban Pyramid The Kid and Pieclops

seasons.name: Season 14 - Week 3 (Mar 29 - Apr 4)
seasons._comment: Week 3: Ban Husker Knight and Pyramid The Kid

seasons.name: Season 14 - Week 4 (Apr 5-11)
seasons._comment: Week 4: Ban Embarrassing Bard and Pieclops - REPEAT rotation after this

seasons.name: Permanent Bans (All Seasons)
seasons._comment: Add any units that should ALWAYS be banned here

how_this_works.1: Each week, a different pair of creatures is banned
how_this_works.2: Cooler Jake (leader) is banned for the entire Season 14
how_this_works.3: The server automatically activates bans based on current UTC time
how_this_works.4: Multiple active ban periods combine (e.g., week1 creatures + permanent leaders)

how_to_extend.step2: Increment week number in id and name
how_to_extend.step3: Update start_date and end_date (7 days apart)
how_to_extend.step4: Choose which 2 creatures to ban from the rotation
how_to_extend.step5: Save file - changes take effect immediately!

admin_tips.viewing_active_bans: Visit /persist/static/pvp_banlist to see currently active bans
admin_tips.testing_dates: Change dates to test different ban periods (use past dates to verify expired bans don't apply)
admin_tips.emergency_disable: Set end_date to past date to immediately disable a ban period
admin_tips.all_bans_active: To ban all 4 creatures at once, set one period with all IDs in banned_creatures array
